notes: Argentina are at full strength with Scaloni making no changes to his confirmed 4-4-2 XI — Messi starts having played every minute of the tournament and is fit with no concerns. Switzerland suffer a major blow as top scorer and creative hub Johan Manzambi (3 goals, 2 assists, knee injury) is confirmed out for the quarterfinal, with Michel Aebischer and Luca Jaquez also carrying muscle injury doubts.
home_scorers: Lionel Messi (tournament top scorer with 8 goals, on penalties, creator-in-chief
Julian Alvarez (co-striker in 4-4-2, physical focal point, strong in transition)
Enzo Fernandez (attacking midfielder, scored the 90th-minute winner vs Egypt, se
away_scorers: Breel Embolo (lone striker / starting centre-forward with Manzambi absent)
Dan Ndoye (wide attacker, key outlet in transition, set-piece danger)
Granit Xhaka (deep-lying playmaker, long-range shooting threat, set-piece taker)
